arts.ttl: Man United suffer transfer blow as Bayer Leverkusen 'make Victor Boniface contract decision'
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly suffer a blow in their pursuit of Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface as details emerge over new contract negotiations.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid is on claims La Liga expert as Kylian Mbappe 'clicking' concerns revealed
arts.sum: The French World-Cup winner missed a penalty against Athletic Bilbao as pressure continues to grow on Carlo Ancelotti
